definitions: n. 人科动物（特指人类及其已灭绝的近亲）

examples.text: But while the hominins found themselves powerless in a world they had to adapt to, our starting conditions could not be more different.
examples.explanation: 句中 hominins 指代人类祖先，与后文现代人类形成对比。

reviewSessions.example_text: But while the hominins found themselves powerless in a world they had to adapt to, our starting conditions could not be more different.
expected_definitions: n. 人科动物（特指人类及其已灭绝的近亲）
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了“人类祖先/人类及其近亲”这一核心含义。
matched_points: 与例句中指代早期人类、和现代人类对比的用法一致
